description:
This quiz tests Bash scripting skills with 16 questions covering variables, loops, conditionals, string manipulation, functions, and syntax gotchas. The difficulty ranges from basic to tricky, and the tone is evaluative, aiming to sharpen or prove shell scripting proficiency.
Topics: variables, loops, conditionals, string manipulation, functions, syntax gotchas
Audience: Bash users, developers, and sysadmins
